fields.name: Smitten
fields.description: Emotionally captivated by the seducer — more open to their influence.

fields.name: Inspired
fields.description: Inspired by an ally's rallying words; the next action lands harder.

fields.name: Charmed
fields.description: Charmed into fighting for the caster.

fields.name: Calm
fields.description: Calmed into holding — will not attack.

fields.name: Soulfray
fields.description: Test condition

fields.name: Corrupted by Wild Hunt
fields.description: Corruption from the Wild Hunt resonance.

fields.description: Test condition

fields.description: Test condition

fields.description: Test condition

fields.description: Test condition

fields.name: Corrupted by Web of Spiders
fields.description: Corruption from the Web of Spiders resonance.

fields.description: Test condition

fields.name: Tempered Against Light
fields.description: The caster's flesh remembers an old burn; they walk hallowed ground unscathed.
fields.player_description: You walked into the light and walked out unchanged. Some part of you is being remade.
fields.observer_description: Their skin barely flickers in the consecrated air.

fields.name: Singed
fields.description: A faint mark of celestial rejection.
fields.player_description: Light glances along your skin. A faint mark stings where the spell met sanctified air.
fields.observer_description: A pale brand glows briefly on their skin.

fields.name: Burning
fields.description: Sanctified flame on Abyssal flesh.
fields.player_description: Your skin burns where it meets the consecrated air.
fields.observer_description: They smolder, marked by light they cannot bear.

fields.name: Hallowed Burn
fields.description: A grievous, self-rebuking mark from sanctified ground.
fields.player_description: The sanctified ground answers the spell with fire. You are flung from the working, burning.
fields.observer_description: They are flung from their spell, burning where the light touched them.

fields.name: Cast Disrupted
fields.description: The casting failed mid-working; threads in the caster's hands snap.
fields.player_description: The threads in your hands snap. Whatever you were weaving has come undone.
fields.observer_description: The spell goes wide and collapses around them.

fields.name: Abyssal Resonance — Minor Attunement
fields.description: The dissolution that permeates this place recognises the caster's touch. The boundary between intent and effect thins slightly, smoothing the passage of abyssal workings.
fields.player_description: Something in the air here knows you. Your spells feel lighter, the threads a little more willing than usual.
fields.observer_description: A subtle ease settles over their gestures — as though the place itself is helping them.

fields.name: Abyssal Resonance — Deep Attunement
fields.description: The concentrated dissolution saturating this place and the caster's own abyssal nature are in alignment so deep that the distinction between them blurs. The caster's workings are carried on the current of the place's power.
fields.player_description: The place pours into you. Every thread you reach for is already half-woven by the dissolution around you. You are not working against the world here — you are the world working.
fields.observer_description: The dissolution in the air seems to gather toward them, pulled by the same source that moves in their hands.

fields.name: Hallowed Rejection
fields.description: An Abyssal-aligned soul remembers a wound made by sanctified light. Whenever the bearer casts in a celestial-aura room, the rejection answers with fire.
fields.player_description: You bear a scar that hates hallowed ground.
fields.observer_description: They flinch from sanctified air.

fields.name: Tether Strain
fields.description: The wear of carrying another soul's sins. Decays with rest.

fields.name: Soul Tether Active
fields.description: Marker condition installed on Sinners with an active Soul Tether. Carries the reactive subscriber triggers.

fields.name: Oathbound Resolve
fields.description: Renewed by oath and comradeship, this character fights with heightened resolve. The bond of covenant fortifies them against doubt and fatigue.

fields.name: Oathbound Fury I
fields.description: The covenant's oath sharpens the Sword's edge. This character strikes harder and commands the field with renewed purpose.

fields.name: Oathbound Fury II
fields.description: A veteran Sword's oath burns brighter still. Strength, commanding presence, and razor-sharp instincts combine into a formidable battlefield force.

fields.name: Oathbound Bulwark
fields.description: The covenant's oath fortifies the Shield's resolve. This character endures more, holds the line longer, and resists punishment that would fell lesser warriors.

fields.name: Oathbound Grace
fields.description: The covenant's oath lends the Crown a serene authority. This character steadies allies with poise and draws their trust in the heat of battle.

fields.name: Wet
fields.description: The target is wet.

fields.name: Frozen
fields.description: The target is frozen.

fields.name: Soaked
fields.description: The target is soaked.

fields.name: Concealed
fields.description: The bearer cannot be perceived by anyone who hasn't detected them.

fields.name: Unconscious
fields.description: Completely incapacitated. Cannot take any actions, defenseless.
fields.player_description: You are unconscious, adrift somewhere between waking and dream.
fields.observer_description: lies unconscious, completely unresponsive.

fields.name: Sleeping
fields.description: Asleep and dreaming. Cannot take any actions in the waking world.
fields.player_description: You drift in dreams, your body resting somewhere in the waking world.
fields.observer_description: lies asleep, lost in dreams.

fields.name: Bleeding Out
fields.description: Dying: life is draining away without intervention.
fields.player_description: PLACEHOLDER: You are dying. The world narrows; every breath is a fight.
fields.observer_description: PLACEHOLDER: is bleeding out, life visibly fading.

fields.name: Surrounded
fields.description: Cut off from allies, facing mounting attack pressure.

fields.name: Irritated
fields.description: Minor frustration affecting composure.
fields.player_description: A flash of irritation crosses your mind. Something has gotten under your skin.
fields.observer_description: seems slightly annoyed, their patience wearing thin.

fields.name: Upset
fields.description: Noticeable anger affecting judgment.
fields.player_description: Your temper is rising. It's becoming harder to think clearly through the frustration.
fields.observer_description: is visibly upset, their composure slipping.

fields.name: Angry
fields.description: Significant anger affecting control.
fields.player_description: Rage burns in your chest. Your hands tremble with barely contained fury.
fields.observer_description: radiates anger, their face flushed and jaw clenched.

fields.name: Enraged
fields.description: Overwhelming fury, barely contained.
fields.player_description: White-hot rage consumes you. Every thought is drowned in fury, every instinct screaming for violence.
fields.observer_description: is consumed by rage, their entire body trembling with barely-contained fury.

fields.name: Berserk
fields.description: Complete loss of control, devastating intensity.
fields.player_description: You have lost all control. There is only the red haze of absolute fury.
fields.observer_description: has completely lost control, a terrifying vision of unbridled rage.

fields.name: Flustered
fields.description: Minor embarrassment affecting composure.
fields.player_description: Heat rises to your cheeks. A small slip, but it nags at your confidence.
fields.observer_description: appears slightly flustered, a hint of color in their cheeks.

fields.name: Embarrassed
fields.description: Noticeable shame affecting confidence.
fields.player_description: You wish the ground would swallow you. Every eye seems to be judging your failure.
fields.observer_description: is clearly embarrassed, avoiding eye contact and shifting uncomfortably.

fields.name: Humiliated
fields.description: Significant shame affecting performance.
fields.player_description: The sting of humiliation burns deep. You've been exposed, diminished, made small.
fields.observer_description: has been thoroughly humiliated, their posture slumped and spirit visibly wounded.

fields.name: Shamed
fields.description: Deep shame affecting all actions.
fields.player_description: Crushing shame weighs on your every action. You are unworthy, broken, exposed to all.
fields.observer_description: carries themselves with visible shame, as if bearing an invisible weight.

fields.name: Disgraced
fields.description: Complete loss of dignity, devastating penalties.
fields.player_description: You have lost everything - honor, dignity, self-worth. The disgrace is absolute and consuming.
fields.observer_description: has been utterly disgraced, a broken shadow of their former self.
